text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I received some tickets to an amusement park, so
I invite Trainer Kiryuin to go with me.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
An amusement park! I wonder what kind of rides
they have! I'll have to bring Meek sometime!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Well, it is an amusement park, after all! I know
she'll love it!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Which ride should we start with? The first one you
pick is very important!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems more energetic than usual today.
Maybe too energetic, even...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Oh! Way up there! There's a bicycle on a rail!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: A bicycle... on a rail?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
If an Umamusume were to pedal as fast as she
can, she might be able to fly!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Trainer <username>!
Look at that big, blue sky!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
If you could run through the sky, you'd be faster
than anyone else, right?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
This could revolutionize all of my training
regimens up to this point!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
And why stop there? How about that roller
coaster? Think of how amazing it would be if it
were powered by the legs of an Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: What is it?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Of course, I'm the picture of health! I mean, I
haven't slept for a couple of days, but that's not a
problem!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Hey! What are you doing?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I grab the delirious Trainer Kiryuin by the hand
and return to the academy without another word.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry... Your tickets went to waste because of
me...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: It's...

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text:
She's always coming up with new training... for
me...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Meek! Are you doing some solo training?

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: ...Yes.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
In that case... let me get started on a solo training
regim—

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: No... You need rest.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text:
You haven't been getting enough sleep. And it's
my fault.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's not true, Meek! It's due to my lack of
self-discipline!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Thinking about training is natural for a trainer!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
If only I were stronger... Then together with your
growth, we'd surely—
choice_data_list: If you need help, just ask!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Huh? B-but that's...
choice_data_list:
We're both trainers at Tracen Academy, aren't
we?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Trainer <username>...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
...You're right. Our job is to make our racers shine
brighter than anyone else.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
You have my gratitude. As fellow trainers, I really
hope we can help each other out.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thank you!

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: Trainer... Please get some sleep.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
H-hang on! I just came up with a great training
idea!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Let's rent a racetrack. We can have you do a
partner running session with a racecar, and—
choice_data_list: I think it's best for you to just sleep right now.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: ...Fine.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Trainer Kiryuin finally gives in and gets some
much-needed rest.
